name: RESEARCH FRONTIERS INC
summary: Research Frontiers Inc (REFR) is a technology licensing company that develops and licenses its patented SPD-SmartGlass technology, which enables light control in windows, skylights, sunroofs, mirrors, and displays. The company does not manufacture products itself but licenses its suspended particle device (SPD) technology to manufacturers for use in automotive, architectural, aircraft, and marine applications.
